## Type of change

- [ ] Template update
- [ ] Service Catalog change

## Checklist

- [ ] Templates follow [template standards](CONTRIBUTING.md) (required tags, parameters, security defaults)
- [ ] `cfn-lint` passes on any new/modified templates
- [ ] Portfolio TOML updated if adding a new Service Catalog product
- [ ] Documentation updated (templates README, guides, etc.)
- [ ] ADR created if this is a significant architectural change
